title: trichogalium rotundifolium
intro: Trichogalium rotundifolium, also known as the round-leaved thyme or round-leaved speedwell, is a type of flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Trichogalium rotundifolium include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
